title: epidendrum strobiliferum
intro: Epidendrum strobiliferum, also known as the Pinecone Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum strobiliferum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
